youtube_query: Cordelia Erickson-Davis lecture interview consciousness neuroscience
reference_text: This interview explores perception, experience, and consciousness through careful questions and an open, steady conversation.

demographics.notes: public metadata sparse; default American accent per request

fallback_voice.selection_reason: No confirmed public natural-voice source found after expanded audit. Use an adult American female Kokoro voice as a clearly marked fallback, not as a real voice clone.

notes: 2026-06-03 expanded audit plus second targeted pass: no confirmed public natural-voice source or local original ALIUS interview audio found after exact-name, alias, YouTube/yt-dlp, Kaltura, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Archive, Stanford Medicine, Stanford CME/Medcast/Grand Rounds, ALIUS public pages, and local repository searches. Local Issue02/ORegan_Erickson-Davis audio is generated TTS using af_aoede for Cordelia and bm_lewis for Kevin, not usable as a natural reference. Identity/event pages and rejected media/search candidates are recorded in source_candidates; request a direct sample or original interview audio with consent.

source_candidates.title: Second-pass YouTube metadata searches via yt-dlp
source_candidates.failure_reason: yt-dlp exact-name and variant searches returned the already rejected Northampton promo plus unrelated Stanford/Davis/Erickson videos, or no results for Cordelia Michele Erickson-Davis; no result was context-confirmed as Cordelia Erickson-Davis speaking.

source_candidates.title: Local Issue02 ORegan_Erickson-Davis Q&A WAV files
source_candidates.failure_reason: Each paired qa_*.txt file identifies the question voice as Cordelia Erickson-Davis (af_aoede) and answer voice as Kevin O'Regan (bm_lewis), confirming generated TTS output rather than original ALIUS interview audio.

source_candidates.title: Local Issue02 ORegan_Erickson-Davis composite MP3
source_candidates.failure_reason: Composite MP3 is built from the generated qa_*.wav files listed in interview_concat.txt; ffprobe shows 24 kHz mono MP3, but local text metadata confirms the source voices are synthetic.

source_candidates.title: Second-pass public audio/video host searches

fallback_reference.selection_reason: No confirmed public natural-voice source found after expanded audit. Use an adult American female Kokoro voice as a clearly marked fallback, not as a real voice clone.
